moments.title: Wimbledon continues, finals weekend looms
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are in full swing at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, with the men's and women's singles finals scheduled for the final weekend.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Who's making it to Centre Court for the finals? Wimbledon's second week promises high-stakes tennis.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are flying, but are British hopes still alive? Catch all the action from Wimbledon today.

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 takes place at Silverstone Circuit from July 3-5, featuring practice, sprint qualifying, a sprint race, and the main Grand Prix.

angles.name: Race Weekend Kick-off
angles.copy: Engines are revving! The British Grand Prix weekend kicks off tomorrow at Silverstone. Who are you backing for the win?

angles.name: Silverstone Excitement
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! Silverstone is set for three days of F1 action. Get ready for some high-speed drama.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final at Lord's
moments.blurb: Lord's Cricket Ground in London will host the final of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup on July 5, concluding the tournament held across England and Wales.

angles.name: World Cup Final Showdown
angles.copy: It's all down to this! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final is at Lord's on Sunday. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Cricket Glory
angles.copy: A huge day for women's cricket this Sunday as the T20 World Cup culminates at the iconic Lord's. Don't miss the action!

moments.title: Love Island UK continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is currently airing six nights a week on ITV2 and ITVX, having premiered on June 1.

angles.name: Villa Vibes
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of drama and romance from the Love Island villa. Who's coupled up, and who's on the rocks?

angles.name: Crack On
angles.copy: Islanders are grafting hard! Love Island is delivering all the summer feels (and arguments) this week on ITV2.

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival, a leading jazz, soul, and funk festival, takes place from July 3-5 in Glynde Place, East Sussex.

angles.name: Jazz, Soul & Funk Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for a weekend of smooth grooves! Love Supreme Festival kicks off tomorrow in East Sussex.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Sun, soul, and incredible music. Love Supreme is bringing world-class jazz, soul, and funk artists to Glynde Place.

moments.title: Maverick Festival for Americana & Roots
moments.blurb: The Maverick Festival, celebrating Americana and roots music, runs from July 3-5 at Easton Farm Park in Suffolk.

angles.name: Americana Weekend
angles.copy: Dust off your cowboy boots! Maverick Festival, the UK's premier Americana and roots music event, starts tomorrow in Suffolk.

angles.name: Roots & Rhythms
angles.copy: Easton Farm Park is about to come alive with the sounds of Americana. Maverick Festival is back for a weekend of roots music!

moments.title: Todd In The Hole Festival 2026
moments.blurb: The Todd In The Hole Festival, a family-friendly music festival, takes place from July 3-5 in Hertfordshire.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Ready for some family fun this weekend? Todd In The Hole Festival kicks off tomorrow in Hertfordshire!

angles.name: Hertfordshire Hues
angles.copy: Music, food, and good times await! Todd In The Hole Festival brings a packed weekend to Hertfordshire from Friday.

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis!
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, Huey Lewis, turns 76 on July 5, 2026.

angles.name: Huey's Big Day
angles.copy: It's 'Hip to Be Square' when you're celebrating 76! Happy Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis this Sunday!

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, 50 Cent!
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman, 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson), celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6, 2026.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Wishing a massive happy 51st birthday to the one and only 50 Cent on Monday!

angles.name: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
angles.copy: From Queens to global superstar! Happy 51st to 50 Cent. What's his ultimate track for your playlist?

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Another year of peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr this Tuesday!

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: The man behind the beat turns 86! Celebrate Ringo Starr's birthday with your favourite Beatles or solo track.

moments.title: Commonwealth Games King's Baton Relay in Stirling
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games King's Baton Relay will visit the University of Stirling on Monday, July 6, as excitement builds for Glasgow 2026.

angles.name: Baton in Stirling
angles.copy: The King's Baton for Glasgow 2026 is visiting the University of Stirling on Monday! Get your photos with the unique carving.

angles.name: Road to Glasgow
angles.copy: Building excitement for the Commonwealth Games! The King's Baton Relay is making its way across Scotland, stopping in Stirling next week.

moments.title: Henley Festival 2026
moments.blurb: The Henley Festival, known for its mix of music, comedy, and arts, takes place from July 8-12, featuring acts like Boy George & Culture Club, Ezra Collective, and Sugababes.

angles.name: Henley's Finest
angles.copy: Five days of music, comedy, and pure style! Henley Festival kicks off next Wednesday with Boy George & Culture Club headlining.

angles.name: Summer Arts
angles.copy: From Sugababes to jazz, Henley Festival brings a unique blend of entertainment to the riverside from July 8th.

moments.title: Trying Season 5 premieres on Apple TV
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the acclaimed British comedy series 'Trying', starring Rafe Spall and Esther Smith, premieres globally on Apple TV on Wednesday, July 8.

angles.name: Trying Returns
angles.copy: Jason and Nikki are back! Season 5 of the heartwarming comedy 'Trying' hits Apple TV next Wednesday. Who's ready?

angles.name: British Comedy
angles.copy: More laughs and adoption adventures await! Don't miss the return of 'Trying' for its fifth season on July 8th.

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Beck!
moments.blurb: American musician, singer, songwriter, and record producer Beck Hansen turns 56 on July 8, 2026.

angles.name: Beck's Day
angles.copy: He's a 'Loser' no more! Wishing a very happy 56th birthday to the eclectic genius Beck this Wednesday!

angles.name: Genre-Bending Icon
angles.copy: Celebrate Beck's 56th birthday by cranking up your favourite genre-bending hit. What's your go-to Beck track?

moments.title: Versailles: The Dream of a King docuseries
moments.blurb: A new three-episode docuseries, 'Versailles: The Dream of a King', exploring the life of Louis XIV and the palace, begins streaming on Thursday, July 9.

angles.name: Royal History
angles.copy: Step back in time to the court of Louis XIV. 'Versailles: The Dream of a King' streams from Thursday. Intrigue and opulence await!

angles.name: Palace Secrets
angles.copy: Uncover the stories behind one of Europe's most magnificent palaces. New docuseries 'Versailles' is coming to screens July 9th.

moments.title: New 'Little House on the Prairie' on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie', based on Laura Ingalls Wilder's books, premieres on Netflix on July 9.

angles.name: Prairie Revival
angles.copy: The Ingalls family is back! A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix next Thursday. Get ready for some classic storytelling.

angles.name: Family Drama
angles.copy: Nostalgia meets new beginnings. The beloved 'Little House on the Prairie' saga gets a fresh take on Netflix from July 9th.

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, Jack White!
moments.blurb: American musician, singer, songwriter, and producer Jack White (formerly of The White Stripes) turns 51 on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: White Stripes Legend
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Jack White this Thursday! What's your favourite riff from the rock icon?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: From Detroit to global stages, celebrate Jack White's birthday by turning up some White Stripes or Raconteurs.

moments.title: 2000 Trees Festival 2026
moments.blurb: The 2000 Trees Festival, an award-winning independent rock and alternative music festival, takes place from July 8-11 in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire.

angles.name: Rock in the Trees
angles.copy: Get ready to rock! 2000 Trees Festival kicks off next Wednesday in Cheltenham for four days of alternative music.

angles.name: Cheltenham Calling
angles.copy: Independent rock and good vibes! 2000 Trees is back from July 8th. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday, Jessica Simpson!
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and businesswoman Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Fashion Icon
angles.copy: She's still 'Irresistible'! Happy 46th Birthday to the multi-talented Jessica Simpson this Friday!

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: From pop charts to fashion empire! Wishing a happy 46th to Jessica Simpson. What's your favourite of her early 00s hits?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival, celebrating innovative UK and international music, runs from July 10-12 in Moseley Park, Birmingham.

angles.name: Birmingham Grooves
angles.copy: Feel the rhythm! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off in Birmingham next Friday. Get ready for a soulful weekend!

angles.name: Park Party
angles.copy: Moseley Park is about to host three days of incredible music. Don't miss the Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival from July 10th.

moments.title: Wireless Festival cancellation still a talking point
moments.blurb: The Wireless Festival 2026, which was scheduled for July 10-12 in Finsbury Park, London, was cancelled on April 7 after the UK Home Office withdrew headliner Ye's Electronic Travel Authorisation.

angles.name: Festival Fallout
angles.copy: This would have been Wireless Festival weekend in London. The cancellation back in April is still a major talking point in the UK music scene.

angles.name: What If?
angles.copy: No Wireless this weekend, but the reasons behind its cancellation are a reminder of the challenges facing UK festivals. A big miss for London.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Suzanne Vega!
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for her distinctive folk-inspired music, turns 67 on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Luka's Creator
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega this Saturday! What's your favourite track from the folk icon?

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: From 'Luka' to 'Tom's Diner', celebrate Suzanne Vega's 67th birthday by enjoying her timeless storytelling.

moments.title: School Summer Holidays begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting or have already begun for many across the UK, typically running from late June or early July through to late August.

angles.name: Summer's Here!
angles.copy: School's out for summer! For many, the long-awaited summer holidays are officially here. What are your plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The great British summer holiday has begun! Wishing everyone a fantastic break, whether you're staying home or heading away.

moments.title: The Open Championship practice days commence
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days from Sunday, July 12, leading up to the main tournament from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The road to the Claret Jug begins! Practice days for The 154th Open Championship start this Sunday at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Readies
angles.copy: Get a sneak peek at the pros! The Open Championship's practice days offer a chance to see golf's best before the main event kicks off next week.
